grant.title: Phase I CAMEL-CN: Modeling the Messy: Capturing Student Reasoning within High-Dimensional Industrial AI Datasets
grant.nsf_program: NSF 26-501 — CAMEL: Collaboratory to Advance Mathematics Education and Learning for K-12
grant.division: BCS — Social, Behavioral, and Economic Sciences

budget.burn_rate_note: Pre-work period (Jul–Dec 2026): no charges to budget. Budget Year 1 starts 01/01/2027.

ios.psc: Participant Support Costs — segregated per NSF requirement
ios.ae_engineering: Engineering IO — Becca runs; salaries (Napolitano, Reinhart, Zuo, grads, UG); travel (all team); consulting; tuition (1 student)
ios.education: Education IO — Kathy runs; salaries (Yao, Hill, Cesare, Remington, TBD specialist); CSATS costs; tuition (1 student)

irb.note: No human subjects work (recruitment, data collection) until IRB approved. Protocol not yet fully developed.

deliverables.title: Python Notebook Telemetry Framework
deliverables.notes: IPython kernel hooks + FastAPI backend + teacher dashboard. Must be operational before pilot data collection.

deliverables.title: Composable Courseware Modules (Algebra + Statistics)
deliverables.notes: ≥2 modules ready for Year 1 summer institute (4 teachers). L01-02 from IIS-2123343 can be adapted.

deliverables.title: Teacher Professional Development Program
deliverables.notes: Year 1: 4 teachers (budget); Year 2: 12 teachers; Year 3: 12 teachers in AY. NEIC runs monthly academic year.

deliverables.title: Pilot Dataset (~100 students, 2 sites)
deliverables.notes: 1 Title I + 1 rural school. Establish κ ≥ 0.70 inter-rater reliability. BLOCKED until IRB approved.

deliverables.title: Full Student Math Modeling Learning Dataset (~4500 students)
deliverables.notes: 5 layers; tens of millions events; FAIR, ICPSR + OSF, CC-BY.

deliverables.title: Annotation Protocols + Codebook
deliverables.notes: xAPI/Caliper aligned; Reasoning Pattern Codes + Error Taxonomy + Productive Struggle Indicators.

deliverables.title: Data Translation Framework
deliverables.notes: Documented protocol (not software); complexity dials; published OSF + journal submission.

deliverables.title: Proof-of-Concept Classifier (productive vs. unproductive struggle)
deliverables.notes: Random forest or logistic regression; training pipeline on GitHub.

deliverables.title: Publications (empirical + methods)
deliverables.notes: Target: JLS, CI (RQ1); JRME, ER (RQ2); dataset descriptor to JEDM/NeurIPS.

deliverables.title: Project Website
deliverables.notes: Budget: $10K over 3 years ($5K Y1, $3K Y2, $2K Y3). Must launch before pilot data collection.

deliverables.title: Phase II Proposal
deliverables.notes: Budget includes $5,408 Phase II travel in Year 1 for CAMEL cross-network meetings.

milestones.title: Begin hiring CSATS Computational Education Specialist
Reinhart and Zuo begin dataset preparation
3 IOs created by grants office (PSC, AE, Education)
IRB approval obtained — required before any pilot
CSATS AI CS Ed Specialist hired
Industrial datasets prepared (Reinhart AFM + Zuo cooling)
Telemetry framework operational — proof of concept
≥2 Composable Courseware modules ready for teacher PD
Pilot data collection complete (~100 students, 2 sites)
Full data collection underway at all partner schools
Codebook v1 complete (Reasoning Pattern Codes + Error Taxonomy)
Data Translation Framework draft to Practitioner Review Board
Dataset curation complete — 5 layers; bias audit done
Annotation protocols finalized + published on OSF (D6)
Data Translation Framework published on OSF (D7)
Full dataset published on ICPSR + OSF with DOI (D5)

personnel.name: TBH — Grad Student 1
personnel.effort: Grade 12; half-time AY; full tuition Y1&Y2; post-comp Y3

personnel.name: TBH — Grad Student 2
personnel.effort: Grade 12; half-time AY; full tuition Y1&Y2; post-comp Y3
